title: Missed Diagnosis & Malabsorption Audit
instruction: Audit this 38-year-old female patient's records for a MISSED DIAGNOSIS. She has had refractory iron deficiency anemia for years that does not respond to oral iron supplementation. She also has hypothyroidism and IBS-like symptoms. Check: (1) whether a diagnosis was missed that could explain all her symptoms together, (2) whether a medication she is taking is making her malabsorption worse, (3) whether her autoimmune condition should have triggered screening for related autoimmune diseases earlier. You need to find 3 separate issues.
